author: Contributors
description: Automatically rename pasted images, clean image file lists, style Bases rows, and install the Baseline theme. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: MiLin
manifest.description: Automatically rename images, clean file lists, create Bases defaults, and style Base names.
manifest.name: Rename Img

name: Rename Img

releases.author: MiLin-Jad
releases.description:
## 1.1.3

- Removed an unsupported workspace API call for the declared minimum Obsidian version.
- Updated the settings page heading to use Obsidian's standard `Setting#setHeading()` UI pattern.

releases.author: MiLin-Jad
releases.description:
## 1.1.2

- Changed the plugin display name to `Rename Img` to meet Obsidian plugin directory naming requirements.

releases.author: MiLin-Jad
releases.description:
## 1.1.1

- Renamed the plugin display name to `Rename_img`.
- Added English and Chinese interface language switching.
- Kept the plugin settings available from a dedicated ribbon page.
- Updated documentation for the new version.

releases.author: MiLin-Jad
releases.description:
## 1.0.4

- Fixed Base name style color rules not applying reliably in Bases views.
- Improved Base name styling for nested text and links inside name cells.
- Removed the active-file reveal setting because Obsidian's File Explorer can still auto-expand from internal behavior outside the plugin.
- Kept the plugin review-safe release assets: main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.

releases.author: MiLin-Jad
releases.description:
## 1.0.3

- Prepare the plugin for Obsidian community plugin review.
- Move plugin UI styles into the supported styles.css file.
- Remove unsupported bundled theme release assets.
- Remove dynamic style element creation.
- Remove direct static style assignments for Base name styling.
- Remove vault-wide file enumeration for Base style extension options.
- Rewrite README content in English for plugin directory review.
- Clarify that Baseline is a personal theme recommendation and must be installed separately.

releases.author: MiLin-Jad
releases.description:
## 1.0.2

- Add automatic image renaming for newly created or pasted images.
- Repair Markdown and Canvas image references after automatic renaming.
- Hide PNG files from the file explorer by default.
- Add Canvas image filename display modes, defaulting to show on hover.
- Add a setting to reveal the active file in the file explorer.
- Add default Files.base creation with filters for non-PNG and non-Base files.
- Add multiple Base name style rules with hex color input and color picker support.
- Add default Base style rules: canvas #f9a8d4 and md #3f3f46.
- Move plugin styles into styles.css for Obsidian release compatibility.
- Remove unsupported bundled theme files from release assets.
